title: AP-Tender Pre-Commencement Obligations (10-Day Window)
text_english: Within {{precom_window_days}} (default 10) DAYS of the APPOINTED DATE, the Contractor SHALL: (i) APPOINT its REPRESENTATIVE duly authorised to deal with the Authority; (ii) APPOINT a PROJECT MANAGER who shall HEAD the Contractor's DESIGN UNIT and be RESPONSIBLE for SURVEYS, INVESTIGATIONS, DATA COLLECTION, and PRELIMINARY/DETAILED DESIGNS; (iii) UNDERTAKE all acts required before commencement per Applicable Laws and Permits; (iv) MAKE its OWN ARRANGEMENTS for QUARRYING materials needed; (v) PREPARE Construction Zone and CAMP SITE SAFETY CHECKLIST; (vi) PREPARE UPDATED HEALTH, SAFETY and ENVIRONMENT (HSE) PLAN. The Authority SHALL — within {{auth_response_days}} (default 15) days — issue confirmations on Right of Way / land availability per Schedule-A.

title: Design Submission via Proof Consultant — 5 Hard + 1 Soft Copy
text_english: The Contractor SHALL PREPARE and SUBMIT — in such SEQUENCE consistent with the Project Completion Schedule — {{design_hard_copies}} (default 5) HARD COPIES and {{design_soft_copies}} (default 1) SET OF SOFT COPY (CD/pen drive) of the DESIGN and GFC DRAWINGS — DULY CERTIFIED by the PROOF CONSULTANT — to the Authority's Representative for review. For STRUCTURES and SEWERAGE SYSTEM, the Authority's Representative MAY REQUIRE ADDITIONAL DRAWINGS for review per Good Industry Practice. Proof Consultant: {{proof_consultant_name}}; engagement reference: {{proof_consultant_ref}}.
